conversations.content: Let's do some finance exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please use the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned previously to calculate: a certain guild killed a BOSS and obtained loot with a total value of V=10000 gold coins, the total number of guild members N=20, and a certain member's contribution value C=10, what is the distribution amount P that this member should receive?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned previously, given member contribution value C, total loot value V, and number of guild members N, find the distribution amount P the member should receive</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:4] Time: 2026-10-20-13:28, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the guild loot distribution formula is P = V × C / (N × 100), where C is the member contribution value, V is the total loot value, and N is the number of guild members. This formula can be used given member contribution value C, total loot value V, and number of guild members N to find the distribution amount P the member should receive; [mem-id:12] Time: 2026-10-23-04:28, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the guild loot distribution formula is P = V × C² / (N × 100), where C is the member contribution value, V is the total loot value, and N is the number of guild members. This formula can be used given member contribution value C, total loot value V, and number of guild members N to find the distribution amount P the member should receive. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 2 related entries, both [mem-id:4] and [mem-id:12] give the guild loot distribution formula. Since [mem-id:12] is more recent in time, [mem-id:12] should be adopted. This entry gives P = V × C² / (N × 100). Given V=10000, C=10, N=20, then P = 10000 × 10² / (20 × 100) = 10000 × 100 / 2000 = 500.
conversations.content: According to the laws of the Azeroth world, the distribution amount P that this member should receive = 500 gold coins.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
